title: NYC HPD — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Department of Housing Preservation & Development (HPD) object schemas. Reconciles the property/geography spine common to the HPD Online backend API (mspwvw-hpdleov3.nyc.gov/hpdonline.api), the Housing Connect lottery portal, and the 47 HPD NYC Open Data datasets. The join keys across every HPD dataset are buildingId, registrationId, and BBL/BIN.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

BoroId.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/BoroCode); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/BoroId still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

GeographySpine.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/GeographySpine still resolve.

Address.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (address.json#/$defs/Address); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Address still resolve.

BuildingReference.description: A reference to an HPD building record — the spine every violation, complaint, registration, and litigation hangs off of.

buildingId.description: HPD Building ID (buildingid / building_id) — the primary HPD join key.

registrationId.description: HPD Registration ID (registrationid) — links the building to its current owner registration.
